label: Split Terminal
block: {id:"createSplitTerminal",label:"Split Terminal",icon:"splitscreen",keybindings:{binding:{mod:!0,key:"\\"}}}

label: Confirm Window Reload
block: {isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Editor",label:"Confirm Window Reload",description:'Toggle if a confirmation is shown when using the "Reload Window" button.',settingType:"switch"}

label: Enable Demo Mode (Beta)
block: {isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Enable Demo Mode (Beta)",description:'When enabled, your UI will be slightly modified to ensure more consistent demos. This is only recommended for demo purposes. In most cases, you can run "Antigravity: Start Demo Mode" and "Antigravity: Stop Demo Mode" to control this switch and update your ~/.gemini/antigravity data directory.',settingType:"switch"}

label: Agent Host Address
block:
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Agent Host Address",description:`When running commands, the agent will try to use this address, and fall back to to the "connector.host.featureDefault" host if not defined.

Note: hosts set here with auto-run enabled will have internet access restricted soon.`,settingType:"text",type:"string"}

label: Verbose agent chat
block: {isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Appearance",label:"Verbose agent chat",description:"Display and preserve intermediate thinking steps",settingType:"switch"}

label: Include Jetski Default Customizations
block: {isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Customizations",label:"Include Jetski Default Customizations",description:"When enabled, the agent will include default customizations, including default skills.",settingType:"switch"}

label: Local
block: {environment:Ad.LOCAL,label:"Local",description:"Run in your current workspace",icon:"computer"}

label: Worktree
block: {environment:Ad.BACKGROUND_WORKTREE,label:"Worktree",description:"Run in a new worktree",icon:"fork_right"}

label: CitC Clone
block: {environment:Ad.BACKGROUND_CITC_WORKSPACE_CLONE,label:"CitC Clone",description:"Clone current workspace into a new independent workspace",icon:"cloud"}

label: Toggle Fullscreen
block: {label:"Toggle Fullscreen",onClick:()=>{a.toggleManagerWindowFullscreen()}}

label: Marketing Emails
block: {label:"Marketing Emails",description:`Receive product updates, tips, and promotions from Google ${r.product.nameShort} via email.`,userSettings:u}

label: Email
block: {label:"Email",description:a?"Peter Pan":n.email,rightElement:p(lo,{onClick:async()=>{await t.logout(),g(),e({to:co.onboarding,replace:!0,search:{login:!0}})},children:"Sign Out"})}

label: Not Signed In
block: {label:"Not Signed In",description:`Sign in to use ${Z7i.name}!`,rightElement:p(Eo,{onClick:()=>t.showLoginFlow(),children:"Sign In"})}

label: File Reads
block: {action:"read_file",label:"File Reads",description:"Allow/deny agent read access to specific files or directories.",grants:s,onChangeGrants:o,placeholder:"e.g., /path/to/file",borderless:!0}

label: Terminal Commands
block: {action:"command",label:"Terminal Commands",description:"Allow/deny specific terminal commands.",grants:s,onChangeGrants:o,placeholder:"e.g., npm test",borderless:!0}

label: Commands Outside Sandbox
block: {action:"unsandboxed",label:"Commands Outside Sandbox",description:"Allow/deny agent command execution outside the sandbox.",grants:s,onChangeGrants:o,placeholder:"e.g., curl",borderless:!0}

label: File Access Rules
block: {label:"File Access Rules",badge:Y>0?Y:void 0,description:"Configure allowed and denied paths for file reads and writes.",rightElement:p(lo,{onClick:()=>{re("file")},children:"Open"})}

label: Terminal Commands
block: {label:"Terminal Commands",badge:P>0?P:void 0,description:"Configure allowed terminal commands.",rightElement:p(lo,{onClick:()=>{re("command")},children:"Open"})}

label: Commands Outside Sandbox
block: {label:"Commands Outside Sandbox",badge:W>0?W:void 0,description:"Configure allowed commands outside the sandbox.",rightElement:p(lo,{onClick:()=>{re("unsandboxed")},children:"Open"})}

label: Security Preset
block: {label:"Security Preset",description:De,value:Se==="custom"?"Custom":One[ge][Se]?.displayName??"Custom",options:[...ie.presets,"custom"],displayResolver:it=>it==="custom"?"Custom":One[ge][it]?.displayName??"Custom",resolveOptionToDescription:it=>it==="custom"?"Manually customize individual settings.":One[ge][it]?.shortDescription,onSelect:it=>{Ye(it),Ue(it)},wide:!0}

label: Disable Eager Cloning
block: {settingKey:Mr.DISABLE_EAGER_CLONING,label:"Disable Eager Cloning",description:"Disable pre-warming of workspace clones."}

label: Maximum Active Workspaces
block: {settingKey:Mr.MAX_CLONED_WORKSPACES,label:"Maximum Active Workspaces",description:"Maximum number of concurrent active source workspaces tracked in the clone pools.",type:"number",min:1}

label: Maximum Clones Per Workspace
block: {settingKey:Mr.MAX_CLONES_PER_WORKSPACE,label:"Maximum Clones Per Workspace",description:"Maximum number of pre-warmed workspace clones cached per active source workspace.",type:"number",min:1,max:8}

label: Execute URLs
block: {action:"execute_url",label:"Execute URLs",description:"Allow/deny agent browser actuation access to specific URLs.",grants:r,onChangeGrants:f=>{t.setPrefValue(Mr.PERMISSION_GRANTS_GLOBAL,f)},placeholder:"e.g., https://example.com",borderless:!0}

label: All tools (*)
block: {value:"*",label:"All tools (*)",description:"Hook will trigger if any tool is executed."}

label: run_command
block: {value:"run_command",label:"run_command",description:"Hook will only trigger if the tool name matches run_command."}

label: run_command or view_file
block: {value:"run_command|view_file",label:"run_command or view_file",description:"Hook will only trigger if the tool name matches run_command or view_file."}

label: Browser tools (browser_.*)
block: {value:"browser_.*",label:"Browser tools (browser_.*)",description:"Hook will only trigger if the tool name starts with browser_."}

label: Include Jetski Default Customizations
block: {settingKey:Mr.INCLUDE_JETSKI_DEFAULT_CUSTOMIZATIONS,label:"Include Jetski Default Customizations",description:"When enabled, the agent will include default customizations, including default skills."}

label: Manage Hooks
block: {label:"Manage Hooks",description:"Configure agent hooks",rightElement:p(lo,{onClick:()=>{j("hooks")},children:"Customize"})}

label: Skill Custom Paths
block: {label:"Skill Custom Paths",description:F,currentList:ee,onDidChangeList:fe,placeholder:"Enter directory path..."}

label: Create Documents
block: {label:"Create Documents",description:"Gives the agent permission to create and upload documents to google drive",checked:g.canCreate,onCheckedChange:C}

label: Search
block: {label:"Search",description:"Gives the agent permission to search through google drive. The agent will only see file titles, not file contents",checked:g.canSearch,onCheckedChange:N}

label: Marketplace Item URL
block: {label:"Marketplace Item URL",description:`Changes the base URL on each extension page. You must restart ${t.nameShort} to use the new marketplace after changing this value.`,configurationKey:"antigravity.marketplaceGalleryItemURL",placeholder:"https://open-vsx.org/vscode/item"}

label: Marketplace Gallery URL
block: {label:"Marketplace Gallery URL",description:`Changes the base URL for marketplace search results. You must restart ${t.nameShort} to use the new marketplace after changing this value.`,configurationKey:"antigravity.marketplaceExtensionGalleryServiceURL",placeholder:"https://open-vsx.org/vscode/gallery"}

label: Read Files
block: {action:"read_file",label:"Read Files",description:"Paths the agent can read inside this workspace.",grants:V,onChangeGrants:x,placeholder:"Enter file or directory path...",borderless:!0}

label: Write Files
block: {action:"write_file",label:"Write Files",description:"Paths the agent can modify inside this workspace.",grants:V,onChangeGrants:x,placeholder:"Enter file or directory path...",borderless:!0}

label: Commands Outside Sandbox
block: {action:"unsandboxed",label:"Commands Outside Sandbox",description:"Commands the agent can run outside the sandbox in this workspace.",grants:V,onChangeGrants:x,placeholder:"e.g., curl",borderless:!0}

label: Safe Merge
block: {value:"safe_merge",label:"Safe Merge",description:"Checks for pending changes before merging.",enumValue:wte?.SAFE_MERGE??2}

label: Overwrite
block: {value:"overwrite",label:"Overwrite",description:"Overwrites changes in the target workspace.",enumValue:wte?.OVERWRITE??1}
